## Issue Summaries

### LOCAL-PERF-001: Repeated syntax_property calls for ASCII characters in regex word-boundary opcodes

- **Level:** 4 (Benchmarked)
- **Classification:** performance-pathology
- **Platforms:** linux, macos, all
- **Affected revision:** `3ca168b80ae6d7b25fe55784dde3ad24faff7be2`
- **Candidate fix:** `families/regex-syntax-cache/baseline/implementation.patch`
- **Apply:** passed
- **Build:** blocked
- **Test:** passed
- **Benchmark:** passed
- **Known limitations:**
  - Build status blocked: no autoconf or libncurses-dev on this Linux host; git apply --check passes against base commit.
  - Benchmark is a standalone C microbenchmark; no full Emacs binary required.
  - SYNTAX_TRU is guarded by parse_sexp_lookup_properties; will not engage when text properties set per-character syntax.

### LOCAL-PERF-002: Repeated char_table_translate calls for ASCII characters in regex case-folding match loops

- **Level:** 4 (Benchmarked)
- **Classification:** performance-pathology
- **Platforms:** linux, macos, all
- **Affected revision:** `3ca168b80ae6d7b25fe55784dde3ad24faff7be2`
- **Candidate fix:** `families/regex-translate-cache/baseline/implementation.patch`
- **Apply:** passed
- **Build:** blocked
- **Test:** passed
- **Benchmark:** passed
- **Known limitations:**
  - Build status blocked: no autoconf or libncurses-dev on this Linux host; git apply --check passes against base commit.
  - Benchmark is a standalone C microbenchmark; no full Emacs binary required.
  - TRANSLATE_TRU only caches the ASCII 0-255 range; Unicode code points >255 always take char_table_translate.

### LOCAL-PERF-003: Structural conflict when composing regex syntax and translate caches; combined overhead

- **Level:** 4 (Benchmarked)
- **Classification:** performance-pathology
- **Platforms:** linux, macos, all
- **Affected revision:** `3ca168b80ae6d7b25fe55784dde3ad24faff7be2`
- **Candidate fix:** `families/regex-combined-cache/baseline/implementation.patch`
- **Apply:** passed
- **Build:** blocked
- **Test:** passed
- **Benchmark:** passed
- **Known limitations:**
  - Build status blocked: no autoconf or libncurses-dev on this host.
  - The baseline patch was regenerated on 2026-06-26 to fix corruption in the original ascii_caches_combined_0001.patch.
  - The SYNTAX_TRU and TRANSLATE_TRU caches are independent; no unified generation counter.

  - No macOS build environment available on this host; all tests are blocked.

### LOCAL-PERF-005: RSS ratchet from malloc zone free-list accumulation after Emacs GC on macOS

- **Level:** 3 (Regression-tested)
- **Classification:** performance-pathology
- **Platforms:** macos
- **Affected revision:** `3ca168b80ae6d7b25fe55784dde3ad24faff7be2`
- **Candidate fix:** `families/malloc-pressure-relief/baseline/implementation.patch`
- **Apply:** passed
- **Build:** blocked
- **Test:** passed
- **Benchmark:** not-run
- **Known limitations:**
  - Platform-blocked for malloc_zone_pressure_relief: macOS only (HAVE_MALLOC_MALLOC_H).
  - git apply --check passes on Linux (patch applies cleanly; #ifdef guards make it a no-op).
  - The alloc.c patch IS cross-platform compilable; the HAVE_MALLOC_MALLOC_H guard means it compiles as a no-op on Linux.
